KOMEIJIKOISHI-ANCIENT_SETTINGS.title: Ancient Settings
KOMEIJIKOISHI-VISUAL_SETTINGS.title: Visual Settings
KOMEIJIKOISHI-ANCIENT_WEIGHTS.title: Ancient Spawn Weights
KOMEIJIKOISHI-ENABLE_ANCIENTS.title: Enable Ancients
KOMEIJIKOISHI-ENABLE_ANCIENTS.hover.desc: When disabled, this mod's custom Ancients will not appear in Acts 2 and 3. In multiplayer, the host's setting at run start is used.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-ENABLE_ANCIENT_WEIGHTS.hov: When enabled, Ancient rooms are rerolled using the weights below. If custom Ancients are disabled, Moriya Two Gods and Hakurei Reimu are hidden from the weight settings and cannot appear.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-USE_FUMO_CARD_ART.title: Use Fumo Card Art
KOMEIJIKOISHI-MORIYA_TWO_GODS_WEIGHT.hov: Adjusts the spawn weight of Moriya Two Gods in the Act 2 Ancient pool. 0 prevents it from appearing. In multiplayer, the host's setting at run start is used.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-HAKUREI_REIMU_WEIGHT.title: Hakurei Reimu Weight
KOMEIJIKOISHI-HAKUREI_REIMU_WEIGHT.hover: Adjusts the spawn weight of Hakurei Reimu in the Act 3 Ancient pool. 0 prevents her from appearing. In multiplayer, the host's setting at run start is used.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-OROBAS_WEIGHT.title: Orobas Weight
KOMEIJIKOISHI-PAEL_WEIGHT.title: Pael Weight
KOMEIJIKOISHI-TEZCATARA_WEIGHT.title: Tezcatara Weight
KOMEIJIKOISHI-NONUPEIPE_WEIGHT.title: Nonupeipe Weight

KOMEIJIKOISHI-VAKUU_WEIGHT.title: Vakuu Weight
KOMEIJIKOISHI-DARV_WEIGHT.title: Darv Weight
KOMEIJIKOISHI-OROBAS_WEIGHT.hover.title: Base Game Ancient Weight
KOMEIJIKOISHI-PAEL_WEIGHT.hover.title: Base Game Ancient Weight
KOMEIJIKOISHI-TANX_WEIGHT.hover.title: Base Game Ancient Weight
KOMEIJIKOISHI-VAKUU_WEIGHT.hover.title: Base Game Ancient Weight
KOMEIJIKOISHI-DARV_WEIGHT.hover.title: Base Game Ancient Weight
KOMEIJIKOISHI-OROBAS_WEIGHT.hover.desc: Adjusts Orobas's spawn weight when he is in the actual candidate pool. 0 prevents him from appearing. Only applies while weight adjustment is enabled.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-PAEL_WEIGHT.hover.desc: Adjusts Pael's spawn weight when he is in the actual candidate pool. 0 prevents him from appearing. Only applies while weight adjustment is enabled.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-TEZCATARA_WEIGHT.hover.des: Adjusts Tezcatara's spawn weight when she is in the actual candidate pool. 0 prevents her from appearing. Only applies while weight adjustment is enabled.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-NONUPEIPE_WEIGHT.hover.des: Adjusts Nonupeipe's spawn weight when she is in the actual candidate pool. 0 prevents her from appearing. Only applies while weight adjustment is enabled.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-TANX_WEIGHT.hover.desc: Adjusts Tanx's spawn weight when he is in the actual candidate pool. 0 prevents him from appearing. Only applies while weight adjustment is enabled.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-VAKUU_WEIGHT.hover.desc: Adjusts Vakuu's spawn weight when he is in the actual candidate pool. 0 prevents him from appearing. Only applies while weight adjustment is enabled.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-DARV_WEIGHT.hover.desc: Adjusts Darv's spawn weight when Darv is assigned to an act's candidate pool. 0 prevents Darv from appearing. Only applies while weight adjustment is enabled.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-PLAY_MORIYA_DANCE_FOR_ALL_: When enabled, every player plays the video when Moriya Dance is drawn. When disabled, only the player who drew the curse plays it. In multiplayer, the host's setting at run start is used.
